entries.title: claudeqb
entries.description: Evidence-backed Claude Code planning with project comprehension, autopsy, ontology, ledger continuity, traceability, gate integrity, QA audit, and gated handoff.

entries.title: shipwright-iterate
entries.description: Complexity-adaptive SDLC for ongoing changes. Auto-detects intent + complexity, scales from quick fix to structured feature with specs, plans, reviews, and testing.

entries.title: react-conventions
entries.description: Build React data fetching, mutations, and forms the right way. Matches the codebase's existing approach; prescribes React Query and React Hook Form + Zod only when no pattern exists. Adds Next.js client/server boundary guidance when App Router is detected.

entries.title: shipwright-design
entries.description: Generate UI mockups from IREB specs — standalone HTML screens and user flows

entries.title: research-and-grill
entries.description: Research any topic from the web, then get grilled with Socratic questions. Scales question depth to how much was researched.

entries.title: agentlens
entries.description: Community Edition. Always-on local dashboard for your Claude Code, Cowork & Cursor work: live sessions, sub-agents, tokens, 4-way data provenance and an ULTRACODE strategy view, plus a self-enriching AI feed. Fully local: no hooks, no bundled MCP servers, no telemetry. Advanced token-optimization & the nightly self-improvement engine are available in AgentLens Pro.

entries.title: squatch-tools
entries.description: A few genuinely useful, credential-free MCP tools for everyone: context7 (live library docs), sequential-thinking (structured reasoning), and Playwright (browser automation). Portable npx installs — nothing machine-specific.

entries.title: squatch-cc
entries.description: Squatch.cc — a working system for Claude that actually holds up: search your own session history, decompose a rough idea into a spec, scaffold projects, keep your own local codebooks, and author your own skills — auto-activating, no commands to memorize — with an egress-guard that keeps secrets, PII, and private content from ever leaving the machine.

entries.title: shipwright-changelog
entries.description: Generate changelogs from Conventional Commits, create tags, and manage PRs

entries.title: witty-diagnosis-agent
entries.description: An intelligent diagnostic agent for EulerOS system troubleshooting and analysis

entries.title: shipwright-test
entries.description: Run unit tests, E2E tests, smoke tests, and security scans for Shipwright projects

entries.title: property-research
entries.description: Generate self-contained HTML property research reports — full analysis pages, interactive parcel maps (Leaflet + satellite), easement route maps with toggles, and phased building permit timelines. Produces the same dark-themed, data-dense reports used for Commonwealth Ave (Polk County FL) and Aibonito PR research.

entries.title: shipwright-preview
entries.description: Local browser preview for Shipwright projects — starts dev server and shows URL

entries.title: talon
entries.description: 71-skill bug-hunting & external red-team bundle for Claude Code — 48 hunt-* web/vuln-class + framework skills, enterprise platform attack chains (M365/Entra, Okta, SharePoint, vCenter, SSL-VPN, APK), recon/OSINT, reporting & validation gates, and Burp MCP integration. Skills auto-load by topic; 15 slash commands included.

entries.title: llm-wiki
entries.description: Cross-project bridge to a locally-installed LLM-wiki. Read your compiled knowledge from any project, diagnose pipeline health, contribute back (capture, ingest, hard facts), run maintenance, or report engine bugs upstream. Ships the use-llm-wiki skill; the wiki CLI itself comes from the llm-wiki engine.

entries.title: storyforge
entries.description: AI-powered book writing pipeline: brainstorm, concept, plot, characters, chapters, export

entries.title: marcopolo
entries.description: Secure, persistent remote workspace for analytics, dashboards, and automations across one or more company data connections

entries.title: superctx
entries.description: All the context, in one place for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, and AI coding tools.

entries.title: claude-mem-lite
entries.description: Persistent long-term memory for Claude Code via MCP — captures coding decisions, bugfixes, and context across sessions. Hybrid FTS5 + TF-IDF search with episode batching. Single SQLite DB, no external services. A lighter, lower-cost alternative to claude-mem (episode batching + a smaller model; cost savings are an internal estimate, not a measured benchmark).

entries.title: rawgentic
entries.description: 11 SDLC workflow skills + 4 workspace management + 1 planning skill + 1 security skill + hooks for Claude Code: project registration, setup, session binding, requirements interviewing, issue creation, feature implementation, bug fixing, refactoring, adversarial review, documentation, dependency updates, security audits, performance optimization, incident response, test suite creation, security pattern syncing, and dangerous pattern blocking with per-project exceptions.

entries.title: atopile-dev
entries.description: Design electronics with atopile's declarative DSL (ato). Provides language reference, package creation guides, and electronics design workflows for AI agents working with .ato files and PCB design.

entries.title: my-skills
entries.description: Personal development workflow skills: brainstorming, planning, TDD, debugging, verification, review, and Codex integration

entries.title: odin
entries.description: ODIN (Outline Driven INtelligence) - Advanced code agent with diagram-first engineering and atomic commit workflows for surgical precision in software development

entries.title: beacon
entries.description: Accessibility + AEO inspection for Claude Code. Lighthouse-style 0-100 scoring across 10 categories, interactive HTML reports, jurisdiction-aware WCAG context, framework-specific fixes, and a PostToolUse hook that auto-checks a11y when you edit UI files.

entries.title: darkroom
entries.description: Darkroom Engineering AI coding standards. Layered config with portable AGENTS.md, progressive complexity, and two-tier knowledge system.

entries.title: lightningrod-python-sdk
entries.description: Lightningrod Python SDK — forecasting dataset generation and model fine-tuning skills

entries.title: temper
entries.description: Temper: Quality gates, blast radius analysis, and intent-driven development for AI-generated code

entries.title: discord
entries.description: Discord channel for Claude Code — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /discord:access.

entries.title: voicemode
entries.description: Voice conversations with Claude Code using local speech-to-text and text-to-speech

entries.title: fizzy
entries.description: Fizzy integration for Claude Code. Manage boards, cards, track work, and link code to projects.

entries.title: cowork-to-code-bridge
entries.description: Connect Claude Cowork to Claude Code on your own computer (macOS or Linux). Cowork hands a task to a local Claude Code agent (and can run approved scripts too); the bridge is idempotent, streams progress, and is token-protected. Install with one command; it sets up a global Cowork skill so every session connects automatically — no /plugin, no setup inside Cowork.

entries.title: vanguard-frontier-agentic
entries.description: Cloud and zero-trust agentic workflow marketplace for skills, agents, rules, MCP references, and compliance-aware architecture.

entries.title: astroneval
entries.description: Skill 评测插件。引导用户对本地 Skill 进行自动化评测，支持单 Skill 验证、多 Skill 横评、多模型横评、运行框架横评等场景。

entries.title: ai4comms
entries.description: Claude Code plugin for AI4comms branded deliverables

entries.title: kreuzcrawl
entries.description: Web crawling and scraping with HTML→Markdown and headless-Chrome fallback.

entries.title: klaussy
entries.description: Claude Code boilerplate generator — scaffolds CLAUDE.md (path-scoped), namespaced .claude/skills/<repo>-<skill>/, settings, hooks, and PR template. Includes plugin-level klaussy-init and klaussy-update skills plus an MCP server.

entries.title: waitbus
entries.description: Workstation-local event bus + blocking wait/emit primitive for agents: wait on or emit CI, pytest, Docker, filesystem, and Prometheus Alertmanager events without polling, plus a third-party plugin API (`waitbus.sources.v1` entry-point group) for custom sources. GitHub Actions is source #1, with sub-second matrix-cell failure detection via workflow_job + workflow_run.

entries.title: atlas
entries.description: Turn a stated need into a full system design by mining the Atlas knowledge graph.

entries.title: rig
entries.description: rig — a LEGO-style harness composer. Compose bricks (facets/patterns/steps/recipes) at invocation time into a task-specific agent harness. Domain-agnostic engine: dev-flow orchestration (review, implement, PR), pluggable packs — sales deal-review, a conversational mode (rig:talk), a goal-driven loop (rig:goal), existing-PR review (rig:pr), and a prose AI-smell remover (de-ai-smell) — plus a --validate doctor, a /rig:init scaffolder, generators for reviewer personas (/rig:persona) and LLM-wiki domain knowledge (/rig:knowledge), a /rig:catalog cross-tier registry, and run-continuity that survives context compaction via a shipped PreCompact hook. Tiered (project/global) personas and a cross-linked knowledge wiki keep domain knowledge shared, not siloed. Claude Code native; no heavy DSL engine.

entries.title: shipwright
entries.description: The operating doctrine for autonomous build-and-ship work: the loop to run, which sibling skill to reach for and how they chain, and the disciplines that keep the work honest. Loaded when about to build/code/ship or run a self-directed work loop, so a fleet of agents ships the same way. Sits above fixer / perfection / walkabout / honesty / decisions / brainstrust — not a router, the method that runs while you use them.

entries.title: claude-code-rescuetime
entries.description: Log which project and branch you work on in Claude Code to your RescueTime timeline as Highlights. Hook-based, no daemon, stdlib-only Python.

entries.title: board-steward
entries.description: Live project kanban for Claude Code. Auto-tracks shipped / fixed / deferred work as cards on a board.json + live HTML board (127.0.0.1:7891), survives sessions via a SessionStart digest, auto-links edited files to their cards, and backstops un-carded work on Stop. Bootstraps a fresh board by mining past session history.

entries.title: xsolla-ai-kit
entries.description: Xsolla agent skills toolkit — guided, end-to-end workflows for merchant setup, catalog design, Login/NewID, Pay Station, webhooks, storefront build, and shop branding, calling Xsolla REST APIs directly.

entries.title: hmd
entries.description: Nothing ships unproven. Heimdall is an autonomous multi-agent orchestrator for Claude Code that turns one prompt into a finished project — and keeps moving the bar on what counts as done: every plan wires an external, falsifiable oracle so the implementation can never grade its own homework, and the merge stays blocked until the work is proven correct. Decomposes work, spawns parallel agents, enforces quality gates with CTO-level judgment. Live observability via a terminal-native HUD statusline and end-of-run summary card.

entries.title: gander
entries.description: A live Hollywood-Squares dashboard of your Claude Code agents and sub-agents — each one an animated avatar that acts out what it's doing (thinking, coding, reading, spawning, testing, erroring), with a recursive hierarchy view and animated information flow between parent and child agents. Driven automatically by Claude Code hooks.

entries.title: ui-craft
entries.description: Design engineering skill + system for AI coding agents: anti-slop UI, outcome recipes, spec-driven design, design-review + a11y agents, MCP quality gates.

entries.title: pkg-sync
entries.description: Mirror a locally-developed npm package into another project's node_modules (no symlinks, no package.json edits) when testing unpublished local changes across separate repos.

entries.title: flywheel
entries.description: Pragmatic Growth workflow skills for Claude Code and Droid (Factory CLI) — define-goal (plain-language wants → measurable goal contracts, run now via /goal or droid exec, or queued in docs/goals), dispatch (factory orchestrator for the docs/goals queue), loop-architect (design autonomous loop contracts), and factory-doctor (one-pass preflight/doctor).

entries.title: cc-transcript
entries.description: Investigate Claude Code transcripts token-efficiently via the cc-transcript CLI: list, stats, grep, and show instead of reading raw JSONL.

entries.title: claude-code-stack
entries.description: Orchestration stack: foreman + subagents, session/handoff skills, cost & brevity guardrails, and design/data toolchains. Skills are gated at runtime by .claude/stack-config.json.

entries.title: xberg-enterprise
entries.description: Managed Kreuzberg document intelligence on api.xberg.io — async extraction with OCR, URL crawling, presigned uploads, document versioning and diffing, signed webhooks, and usage tracking.

entries.title: harness-claude
entries.description: Lean full-SDLC Claude Code harness — Discover, Plan, Implement, Verify, Maintain — with a vague-intent discovery entry above /spec, subagent orchestration, memory persistence, a product/UX + system design altitude, benchmark-gated cost/token optimization, guarded long-running agent runs, multi-agent parallel fan-out, a bug-fix fast lane, and a release & feedback loop (deploy + observe) that closes the pipeline.

entries.title: asana
entries.description: Manage Asana from the terminal with the `asana` CLI — tasks, projects, sections, subtasks, comments, dependencies, followers, tags, attachments, custom fields, and CSV/JSON batch import.

entries.title: kreuzberg
entries.description: Local document extraction: text, tables, metadata, images from 91+ formats with optional OCR.

entries.title: crawlie
entries.description: Run fast technical-SEO and AI-search (GEO) audits from your agent. Bundles the crawlie MCP server (auto-installed via npx) plus skills for full-site audits, broken-link fixes, pre-launch gates, and GEO readiness.

entries.title: qe-framework
entries.description: QE Framework v7 — Claude-first SIVS loop with full lifecycle hooks, 182 skills, and optional Codex bridge.

entries.title: stromy
entries.description: Claude Code plugin for Stromy branded deliverables — composes nl-gov-data intel/analysis + stromy-format rendering + markdown-canvas deliverable planning over Stromy's brand

entries.title: aco
entries.description: Drive a live Appium session from Claude Code with the aco CLI — start/stop sessions, find elements, tap, swipe, type, screenshot, read page source, switch web contexts, and call platform mobile: extensions on iOS simulators/emulators and real devices.

entries.title: win-customers
entries.description: Understand buyers, package value, create demand, and sell. Validate ICP, Grand Slam Offer, $100M Leads, Breakthrough Advertising, Conversation-First Outreach, Challenger Sale, JOLT Effect, and Key Person of Influence help win customers end-to-end.

entries.title: story-import
entries.description: 逆向导入已有小说。将已写好的小说（半成品或完本）反向解析为标准项目目录结构，兼容后续写作流程。

entries.title: pent-test-buddy
entries.description: Penetration-testing assistant for Claude Code. Scaffolds a scope-governed engagement workspace, intakes Rules of Engagement via a relentless scope interview, gates every action against scope.md, and runs a raw -> knowledge-base distillation pipeline so Claude reads what it already learned instead of re-running scans.

entries.title: code-craftsmanship
entries.description: Code quality and software design skills including Clean Code (Robert C. Martin), Refactoring patterns (Martin Fowler), A Philosophy of Software Design (John Ousterhout), The Pragmatic Programmer (Hunt & Thomas), Domain-Driven Design (Eric Evans), and Working Effectively with Legacy Code (Michael Feathers)

entries.title: cs-ceo
entries.description: CS 시리즈 CEO 오케스트레이터 — 공수 추정 후 CS-test/CS-plan/CS-codebase-review/cs-design/cs-smart-run 자율 배분. v5.5: Dynamic Resolve v2 — 파트너 타입(AGENT/SKILL/PROTOCOL) 자동 감지, 외부 플러그인 에이전트 직접 호출 지원.

entries.title: model-based-design-core
entries.description: Foundational Model-Based Design capabilities for the Simulink product family

entries.title: jellyfin
entries.description: Check server status, active sessions, libraries, and items in Jellyfin via its REST API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

entries.title: react-compiler
entries.description: Write React components and hooks that are fully compatible with React Compiler's automatic memoization: pure components, no props/state mutation, side effects out of render, and no manual useMemo/useCallback/React.memo.

entries.title: legion-router
entries.description: Legion's multi-model brain: delegate scoped tasks from Opus to external model agents (Codex / GPT-5.5 / GPT-5.4 and Cursor Agent) and bring back a verified, metered diff. Ships `legion-delegate` for Codex, `legion-cursor` for Cursor Agent headless runs, the `legion-router` loopback :8082 Anthropic-compatible metering proxy (claude-* / minimax-* pass-through + /ingest), plus the shared cost table and codex-json parser. One orchestrator, a legion of models.

entries.title: sync-skills
entries.description: Reconcile skills between ~/.agents/skills/ (authoritative) and ~/.claude/skills/ (runtime). Creates Windows directory junctions (mklink /J) for missing entries, migrates orphan real directories across scopes, repairs wrong-target junctions, and backfills ~/.agents/.skill-lock.json for migrated entries. Supports --scope global|project and --dry-run.

entries.title: receipts
entries.description: Make your coding agents prove their work: a recorded visual-QA walkthrough + the reasoning behind a PR, packaged into one receipt a human can judge in ~90 seconds. Bundles the `receipts` skill; the CLI lives in the repo.

entries.title: review-code-change
entries.description: Review the diff of the current git branch against a target branch, checking only changed code against a set of extensible standards (security, performance, business logic, React/Next.js/Node/TypeScript). Read-only git.

entries.title: coding-posture
entries.description: Task-aware working modes for coding agents — debug, fix, review, test-first, refactor, optimize, migrate, upgrade, integrate, spike, unstuck

entries.title: legion-orchestrate
entries.description: Legion's dynamic MULTI-MODEL orchestrator — the ultracode loop (decompose -> fan out -> cross-model verify -> synthesize -> gate) made executor-aware: Opus conducts, GPT-5.4 does the bulk of coding in PARALLEL, GPT-5.5 verifies. Ships `legion-fanout` (run many scoped slices in parallel across executors via legion-delegate, collect verified diffs + cost, report) and a SKILL playbook with an LEGION_ULTRACODE max-exhaustive mode (wide fan-out, multi-vote cross-model verify, loop-until-dry). Ties together routing.toml + legion-delegate + legion-share to deliver features with codex carrying >=50% of the work.

entries.title: ado
entries.description: Azure DevOps integration for work item management, PR publishing, iterative PR tending, autonomous work item implementation, and autonomous backlog processing. Orchestrates development methodology skills via the development plugin.

entries.title: sabnzbd
entries.description: View, pause, resume, and manage the SABnzbd Usenet download queue and history via its REST API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

entries.title: conference-organizing-knowledge-skill
entries.description: Google Docsとして公開されている「カンファレンス開催ノウハウ」をSkill化して公開しているプラグイン。3日ごとに自動同期される。

entries.title: context-mode
entries.description: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entries.title: ops-direct-invoke
entries.description: Ascend C Kernel 直调算子开发 Team。含完整工作流（设计→实现→审查→性能验收）、3 个专业 Agent 和工程模板。

entries.title: orleans-dev
entries.description: Microsoft Orleans patterns, best practices, and code review for virtual actor model applications — covers grain design, concurrency, cross-grain communication, streams, and serialization.

entries.title: tracearr
entries.description: Query Tracearr's public API for media tracing and analytics. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

entries.title: tilelang-op-orchestrator
entries.description: TileLang-Ascend 算子端到端开发 Team。3 阶段状态机编排，含 3 个 Subagent，支持设计回退、断点续跑和失败恢复。

entries.title: radarr
entries.description: Search, add, and monitor movies (and collections) in Radarr via its REST API. Check the download queue, quality profiles, and root folders. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

entries.title: code-reviewer
entries.description: Code review toolkit with specialized agents for duplicate detection, EUII leak scanning, exception handling review, test coverage review, design simplification, code simplification, over-engineering / scope-creep detection, architecture review, performance review, schema and wire-contract compatibility review, severity grading quality gate, log review, and PR work item context gathering. Includes a review-pr command that auto-detects tech stack and publishes findings to Azure DevOps.

entries.title: comment-rot
entries.description: Detects comment rot. Comments that no longer match the code they describe after edits. Uses layered semantic analysis (heuristics + code summary + LLM agent review) instead of regex, so it catches logic-vs-comment contradictions a normal linter cannot.

entries.title: tautulli
entries.description: Read Plex viewing activity, watch history, home stats, and users from Tautulli via its API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

entries.title: developer-performance-review
entries.description: Developer performance review skill for analyzing work over time (weeks/months)

entries.title: clean-builds
entries.description: Achieve zero-warning builds through systematic warning elimination, code formatting, and package version validation

entries.title: qbittorrent
entries.description: List, add, pause, resume, and remove torrents and check transfer stats in qBittorrent via its WebUI API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

entries.title: torch-npugraph-ex-skills
entries.description: PyTorch 昇腾 NPU npugraph_ex Skills（6 个）。覆盖图模式知识、代码模板、问题分诊、编译错误、运行时错误和自定义算子入图。

entries.title: haunt-mcp
entries.description: Adds Haunt MCP web extraction: permitted public URL to clean JSON, Markdown, article fields, metadata, and usage checks.

entries.title: artemis-recon
entries.description: Artemis Recon — walks Claude Code through authorized red-team reconnaissance of AI assets (chatbots, agents, LLM-powered features).

entries.title: ascendc-ops-lab-developer
entries.description: Ascend C 算子自动生成 Team。通过双路径（design.md / TileLang）设计表达和 AscendC 转译优化，端到端完成算子开发（7 Phase 工作流），含 1 个专业 Agent 和 9 个配套 Skill。

entries.title: speedpr
entries.description: Automate the current working branch to 'Ready To Merge' status. Auto-detects phase (A:uncommitted → B:unpushed → C:no PR → D:PR exists), handles review threads via GitHub GraphQL, CI failures, and merge conflicts. Supports /loop for polling and an `auto` argument to enable automatic merging.

entries.title: overseerr
entries.description: List, search, create, approve, and decline media requests in Overseerr via its REST API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

entries.title: debugging
entries.description: Log-first debugging methodology using structured JSONL logs queried with DuckDB. Includes debugging workflows, logging enablement for codebases, logging compliance review with calibrated Trace-coverage recommendations for AI-assisted debugging, and systematic root-cause debugging.

entries.title: grok-it
entries.description: Claude Code plugin that exposes Grok x_search, image generation, and video generation through a local MCP server.

entries.title: whitebox-testing
entries.description: White-box testing skill with path coverage, cyclomatic complexity, decision-path analysis, dataflow path coverage, and test generation for Python/JS/Java/C.

entries.title: agora
entries.description: Build apps on the Agora SDK (@agora-sdk/*): provider+hooks model for comments, reactions, feeds, auth, chat, spaces — plus the fork's divergences from upstream Replyke. Skills look things up via a bundled API surface, the consumer's installed .d.ts, and (optionally) the Replyke docs, so they work offline.

entries.title: sandbox-auth
entries.description: Authenticate outbound network calls from inside a sandbox running behind a MITM egress-proxy + gateway auth-webhook (e.g. SandboxedOstoolsMcpServer). Tokens are injected server-side and the agent never holds them. A common egress-auth skill owns the wire contract (HTTP 511 auth_pending handshake, 403 deny), backoff polling, human-in-the-loop device-code relay, and a portable Python probe engine; thin user-invocable skills (connect, azure-devops, microsoft-graph) reference and invoke it with service-specific probe URLs, scopes, and endpoints.

entries.title: mise-en-place
entries.description: Mirepoix's agent behavioral contract — five principles (Karpathy four + Justified Action / Five Whys per ADR-016) + 8 operating modes + 5 Mirepoix addenda (including multi-agent review). Activates as a skill that elicits the active mode from the operator at session start.

entries.title: legion-setup
entries.description: One skill to install AND update the Legion marketplace — no team hand-holding. First run installs marketplace plugins, cross-harness skills, Codex and Cursor bridges, shared CLIs, and daily refresh/self-learning; after that the same skill updates to latest. Ships `legion-setup`, `legion-codex-setup`, and `legion-cursor-setup`.

entries.title: rustarr
entries.description: Connects Claude Code to the rustarr MCP server — one tool surface over a media-automation fleet (Sonarr, Radarr, Prowlarr, Tautulli, Overseerr, qBittorrent, SABnzbd, Plex, Jellyfin, and more). Also bundles standalone per-service skills (sonarr, radarr, prowlarr, overseerr, sabnzbd, qbittorrent, plex, jellyfin, tautulli, tracearr, bazarr) that drive each service's REST API directly as an offline fallback when the MCP server is unavailable.

entries.title: model-infer-skills
entries.description: NPU 模型推理优化原子 Skills（11 个）。覆盖框架适配、并行策略、KVCache/FA、融合算子、图模式、精度/运行时调试、多流、预取和 SuperKernel。

entries.title: ops-code-reviewer
entries.description: Ascend C 算子代码审查 Team。含独立审查 Agent，支持 PR diff 审查和代码质量评估。

entries.title: campaign-vault
entries.description: Build and refresh the Pappy & Co Campaign Data Vault: a single self-contained, on-brand live-artifact HTML dashboard of past marketing-campaign performance across Meta Ads, Google Ads, Google Analytics, Klaviyo (email) and Attentive (SMS), organized by campaign theme (Sweepstakes, Cigar Releases, Vault Opening, Holiday & BFCM, Mixers, …) with year-over-year comparison, a day-level campaign calendar, a two-period Compare tool, and a planning view. Aggregated and PII-free.

entries.title: legion-codex-mode
entries.description: The Codex-CLI-primary routing brain for Legion: you are GPT-5.5 doing most of the work, and this skill tells you WHEN to hand a task up to Claude via `legion-claude` (deep architecture, polished/complex frontend with the impeccable skill, final cross-model review, tie-breaks, or when you're stuck) versus doing it inline — with automatic GPT-5.5 fallback if the Claude limit is hit. The mirror image of legion-router (the Claude-primary brain). Also maps what runs natively on Codex (MCPs, mirrored skills, bridged commands/agents) so you don't reach for Claude needlessly.

entries.title: assumptions
entries.description: Assumption Archaeologist — surfaces load-bearing implicit assumptions baked into code ("always UTC", "already sorted", "user is authenticated here") into a living ASSUMPTIONS.md with stable IDs and a status lifecycle. Command-driven only; never runs automatically, so it never spends tokens unless you ask.

entries.title: liter-llm
entries.description: Universal LLM API client for 143 providers — chat, streaming, tools, embeddings, search, OCR, plus an OpenAI-compatible proxy and an MCP server.

entries.title: react-effect-event
entries.description: Use React's useEffectEvent to separate reactive dependencies from non-reactive "latest value" reads inside Effects, fixing stale closures and effects that re-run more than they should. React 19.2+.

entries.title: tool-conventions-cmd
entries.description: Scaffold a new TypeScript CLI tool's documentation and configuration, or audit an existing tool against the project tool-conventions (docs/tools/<name>.md format, ~/.tool-agents/<name>/ config folder, four-tier env-var resolution chain, vendor-canonical LLM provider names, no-fallback rule). Bundles the /tool-conventions command and its tool-doc-config-architect subagent.

entries.title: sonarr
entries.description: Search, add, and monitor TV series in Sonarr via its REST API. Check the download queue, history, and quality profiles. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

entries.title: pypto-op-orchestrator
entries.description: PyPTO 算子端到端开发 Team。7 阶段状态机编排，含 3 个 Subagent，支持断点续跑和失败恢复。

entries.title: tokenash
entries.description: Tokenash startup hooks for Claude Code and GitHub Copilot CLI.

entries.title: tree-sitter-language-pack
entries.description: Parse and extract code intelligence from 300+ programming languages with tree-sitter — structure, imports, symbols, and syntax-aware chunking.

entries.title: tilelang2ascend-ops-developer-skills

entries.title: skill-smith
entries.description: Thin meta-skill that creates other Claude Code skills to an industry-leading, tested-real bar. Use when you want to author a new skill, batch-create a series of skills, scaffold a Skill-Repo-Spec-conformant skill repo, optimize a skill's triggering description, or stand up a create -> evaluate -> iterate pipeline. It is research-first (delegates landscape + frontier-design recon to market-intel so every skill is designed against the state of the art), does deterministic Skill-Repo-Spec v1 scaffolding, enforces a hard anti-self-deception acceptance gate (eval lift vs baseline, held-out trigger rate, system-prompt token budget, cross-library dedup, security audit, spec conformance, single-responsibility focus), then hands the accepted skill to self-evolve for regression-gated auto-iteration; batch mode fans out many candidates under a global library-budget manager. Delegates generation depth, evaluation rigor, and iteration to existing tools rather than reimplementing them.

entries.title: arcade
entries.description: Dynamic tool discovery and execution across 500+ Arcade tools (Slack, Gmail, GitHub, Google Calendar, Notion, Linear, Dropbox, and more) over a single MCP connection. Ships an operator subagent, skills, and slash commands so the discovery loop stays out of your main conversation.

entries.title: bruhs
entries.description: End-to-end development lifecycle: scaffold projects, plan and build features, verify behavior with evidence, ship PRs, walk reviewers through changes, watch CI to green, address review comments, clean up after merge, audit codebases, surface architectural deepenings, recap shipped work. Use when starting a project, implementing a feature, verifying a fix, shipping code, reviewing PRs, addressing review feedback, merging, auditing code quality, or summarizing shipped work.

entries.title: drydock
entries.description: Transforms Claude Code from raw code generation into a full production-ready engineering system. 15 specialized agents cover architecture (12-Factor + Clean Architecture), API-first contracts, tested backend/frontend, observability & telemetry, security-by-default, CI/CD + supply-chain hardening, automated testing, performance budgets, feature flags, developer experience, and per-product regulatory compliance (SOC 2 / GDPR / HIPAA / PCI-DSS) — plus security audit + VAPT (OWASP 2025 / API / LLM Top 10) — from idea to ship. 11 of the 15 agents run as real isolated subagents (auto-discovered from agents/) orchestrated via the Task tooling; the orchestrator and three planning agents run in-context as skills. Enterprise-grade by default and evidence-grounded with anti-hallucination guardrails.

All with a cranky senior engineer persona.

entries.title: enforce-mode
entries.description: Always-on universal engineering rules + project-aware domain rules with PECK v3 level-aware advisory guidance (never blocks or denies — every check approves and injects context) and a Grounded-Generation Layer that traces every external API call back to a researched source (UNVERIFIED flag when it can't), reducing hallucination. Detects 41 domains across 12 lifecycle phases via weighted signal scoring. Modular pattern architecture with per-pattern severity (WARN/STRICT/CRITICAL) mapped to levels (solo/team/prod). Ships 28 tech-stack-aware department subagents (ground-truth-backed, research-before-code) that realize the CLAUDE.md routing map out of the box.

No closed-source dependency, no account, no telemetry.
